message:
fix(web): Fix bugs in amino acid HUD implementation

- Remove unused CODON_TABLE import from amino-acid-database.ts
- Remove unused AminoAcidDetailedInfo type import from AminoAcidHUD.tsx
- Fix critical bug: Handle negative reading frames (-1, -2, -3) correctly
  in getAminoAcidAtPosition by reverse complementing sequence first

The negative frame fix ensures the HUD shows the correct amino acid
when viewing sequences in reverse complement reading frames.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
